channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SWADHATURE] Swadha Nature Ltd to Review Director Performance and Board Effectiveness
item.description:
Swadha Nature Ltd, formerly known as MS Securities Limited, has announced that a meeting of the Board of Directors will be held on 20th March, 2026. The agenda includes a review of the performance of Non-Independent Directors, the Board as a whole, and the Chairman of the Company. The Independent Directors will also assess the quantity, quality, and timeliness of flow of information. Any other business with the permission of the chair will be discussed.

  • Meeting of the Board of Directors scheduled on 20/03/2026
  • Review of the performance of Non-Independent Directors and the Board as a whole
  • Review of the performance of the Chairman of the Company
  • Assessment of the Quantity, Quality and timeliness of flow of information
  • Potential discussion of other business items with the chair's permission

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Swadha Nature Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [WOSAL] Western Overseas Study Abroad Ltd and CMD Receive 'Award of Outstanding Achievement'
item.description:
Western Overseas Study Abroad Limited and its CMD, Mr. Pardeep Balyan, have been honored with the 'Award of Outstanding Achievement' by the Association of Abroad Education Consultants during its Annual General Meeting held on March 07, 2026 at Astra Resort and Cafe, Kasauli. This recognition is a testament to the company's commitment to providing reliable and high-quality overseas education consultancy services and helping students achieve their international education aspirations.

  • Western Overseas Study Abroad Limited and its CMD, Mr. Pardeep Balyan, received the 'Award of Outstanding Achievement' from the Association of Abroad Education Consultants.
  • The award was given during the Annual General Meeting held on March 07, 2026 at Astra Resort and Cafe, Kasauli.
  • This recognition is a reflection of the continuous trust and support of the company's valued clients and partners.
  • The company remains committed to helping students achieve their international education aspirations.
  • This award motivates the company to continue striving for excellence in their services.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Western Overseas Study Abroad Ltd | Category: Award

item.title: [RAILTEL] RailTel Corporation Declares 2% Interim Dividend for FY 2025-26, Requests Shareholders to Submit TDS Documents
item.description:
RailTel Corporation of India Ltd has declared a 2% interim dividend for the financial year 2025-26. The record date for the dividend payment is set as 13th March 2026. The company has requested shareholders to submit necessary documents for TDS exemption or lower deduction by 16th March 2026. From 19.11.2025, the company will use only electronic modes of payment for dividend. Dividend income has become taxable for shareholders since April 1, 2020, and the company will withhold taxes at prescribed rates on the dividend paid to its shareholders.

  • RailTel Corporation declares 2% interim dividend for FY 2025-26
  • Record date for dividend payment set as 13th March 2026
  • Shareholders requested to submit TDS documents by 16th March 2026
  • Company to use only electronic modes of payment for dividend from 19.11.2025
  • Dividend income is taxable for shareholders since April 1, 2020

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RailTel Corporation of India Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [NATPLAS] National Plastic Industries Ltd Opens Special Window for Transfer and Dematerialisation of Pre-2019 Physical Securities
item.description:
National Plastic Industries Ltd has announced the opening of a special window for transfer and dematerialisation of physical securities sold/purchased prior to 1st April, 2019. This move is in accordance with SEBI Circular No. HO/38/13/11(2)2026-MIRSD-POD/I/3750/2026 dated 30th January, 2026. The notice has been published in Business Standard (English edition) and Lakshadeep (Marathi - Mumbai edition) on 9th March, 2026. The information is also available on the company's website at https://www.nationalplastic.com.

  • National Plastic Industries Ltd opens a special window for transfer and dematerialisation of physical securities.
  • The move is in accordance with SEBI Circular No. HO/38/13/11(2)2026-MIRSD-POD/I/3750/2026 dated 30th January, 2026.
  • Notice has been published in Business Standard (English edition) and Lakshadeep (Marathi - Mumbai edition) on 9th March, 2026.
  • The information is also available on the company's website.
  • This update affects physical securities sold/purchased prior to 1st April, 2019.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NATIONAL PLASTIC INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [DBL] Dilip Buildcon Ltd Receives LOI for 400 kV Sub-station Project from RECPDCL
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Dilip Buildcon Ltd has received a Letter of Intent (LOI) from RECPDCL for establishing a 400 kV Sub-station at Mekhali along with associated transmission lines in Belagavi District, Karnataka. The project's concession period is 35 years from the Commercial Operation Date (COD). The trading window for dealing in the securities of the Company for all insiders, designated persons, and their immediate relatives, connected persons, fiduciaries, and intermediaries is closed till 48 hours from the date the information is made available to the public.

  • Dilip Buildcon Ltd has received an LOI from RECPDCL for a 400 kV Sub-station project in Karnataka.
  • The project's concession period is 35 years from the Commercial Operation Date (COD).
  • The project involves the development, ownership, operation, and maintenance of the Intra-State Transmission System on a BOOT basis under the Tariff Based Competitive Bidding (TBCB) route.
  • The trading window for dealing in the securities of the Company for all insiders, designated persons, and their immediate relatives, connected persons, fiduciaries, and intermediaries is closed till 48 hours from the date the information is made available to the public.
  • The project is to be executed under the tariff-based annuity model.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dilip Buildcon Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [AMAGI] Anoki and Amagi Bring Scene-Level Intelligence to In-Content CTV Ads
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Anoki and Amagi have announced the launch of In-Scene Ads powered by Anoki ContextIQ™ across Amagi’s portfolio of in-content ad formats for Free Ad-supported Streaming TV (FAST). This collaboration integrates Anoki’s ContextIQ™, the industry-leading multimodal AI platform, with Amagi’s THUNDERSTORM server-side ad insertion (SSAI) solution to offer a seamless, non-disruptive way for advertisers to engage viewers during the scenes that matter most at scale. The new offering is first available across Amagi-powered FAST channels and streaming apps. The industry response has been positive, with Dentsu being the first partner to utilize ContextIQ In-Scene Ads in a campaign.

  • Anoki and Amagi announce the launch of In-Scene Ads powered by Anoki ContextIQ™ across Amagi’s portfolio of in-content ad formats for Free Ad-supported Streaming TV (FAST).
  • The collaboration integrates Anoki’s ContextIQ™, the industry-leading multimodal AI platform, with Amagi’s THUNDERSTORM server-side ad insertion (SSAI) solution.
  • The new offering is first available across Amagi-powered FAST channels and streaming apps.
  • Dentsu is the first partner to utilize ContextIQ In-Scene Ads in a campaign.
  • The partnership aims to create a more sustainable and effective ecosystem for advertisers, publishers, and audiences alike.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Amagi Media Labs Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [ROBU] Macfos Ltd Announces 1:10 Bonus Equity Shares Ratio
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The Board of Directors of Macfos Ltd, in a meeting held on 11th March 2026, approved the allotment of bonus equity shares in the ratio of 01:10. The meeting started at 11.00 a.m. (IST) and concluded at 11.17 p.m. (IST. This information is also available on the company's website: www.robu.in.

  • Board of Directors approved the allotment of bonus equity shares in the ratio of 01:10

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Macfos Ltd | Category: Bonus

item.title: [HESTERBIO] Hester Biosciences to Divest 43.81% Stake in Subsidiary Texas Lifesciences
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Hester Biosciences Ltd. announced the divestment of 43.81% equity stake in its subsidiary, Texas Lifesciences Private Limited (TLPL), to the existing promoter shareholders of TLPL. The decision was made at the Board Meeting held on 11 March 2026. TLPL is not a material subsidiary of the company and will cease to be a subsidiary upon completion of the share transfer transaction. The transfer of shares is expected to be completed within three months from the date of the agreement, with a total aggregate value of INR 92 million. Hester will continue to do business with TLPL promoter group and maintain an 11% equity stake in the company.

  • Hester Biosciences to divest 43.81% stake in Texas Lifesciences
  • Transaction value is INR 92 million
  • TLPL will cease to be a subsidiary of Hester Biosciences
  • Hester to maintain 11% equity stake in TLPL
  • Transaction expected to be completed within three months

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HESTER BIOSCIENCES LTD. | Category: Divestment

item.title: [HESTERBIO] Hester Biosciences to Divest 43.81% Stake in Subsidiary Texas Lifesciences Private Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Hester Biosciences Ltd. has announced its decision to divest 43.81% equity stake in its subsidiary, Texas Lifesciences Private Limited (TLPL). The decision was made during a Board meeting on 11th March 2026, following the recommendations of the Audit Committee. The stake will be transferred to the existing promoter shareholders of TLPL. TLPL is not a material subsidiary of Hester Biosciences and will cease to be a subsidiary upon completion of the share transfer transaction. The transaction is expected to be completed within three months from the date of the agreement, with a total aggregate value of INR 92 million. Hester Biosciences will continue to do business with TLPL promoter group and maintain an 11% equity stake in the company.

  • Hester Biosciences to divest 43.81% stake in Texas Lifesciences Private Limited
  • Transaction to be completed within three months from the date of the agreement
  • Total aggregate value of INR 92 million
  • TLPL will cease to be a subsidiary of Hester Biosciences upon completion of the share transfer
  • Hester Biosciences to maintain an 11% equity stake in TLPL

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HESTER BIOSCIENCES LTD. | Category: Divestment

item.title: [HINDOILEXP] Hindustan Oil Exploration Company Ltd Clarifies Compliance with SEBI Regulations and Price Sensitive Information Disclosure
item.description:
Hindustan Oil Exploration Company Ltd has clarified its compliance with the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, specifically Regulation 30. The company has been regularly disseminating updates to the Stock Exchange on all events and information that have a bearing on its operation and performance. This includes all price sensitive information. The company is not aware of the reasons for the price movement in its security but affirms to continue submitting all material and price sensitive information to the Stock Exchanges in a timely manner.

  • Company complies with SEBI Regulation 30
  • Regularly discloses price sensitive information
  • Not aware of reasons for price movement
  • Affirms to continue timely disclosure of material information

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HINDUSTAN OIL EXPLORATION CO.LTD. | Category: Business Update
